summary: DPA page successfully renders with proper diner aesthetic, all required content sections, and mobile-responsive layout. The page displays the correct heading, effective date, section structure, back navigation, and support contact as specified.

violations.description: The main content card uses a lighter shadow treatment instead of the expected hard-offset shadow for branded diner components

actions: Consider applying the proper hard-offset shadow (4px to 6px no-blur) to the main content card to fully align with diner component standards
